hero.description: A doctor-monitored GLP-1 weight loss programme in Kuala Lumpur that helps you feel fuller, eat less, and lose weight steadily. Built around real medical screening, safe dosing, and habits you can keep.

understanding.title: What is a GLP-1 weight loss programme?
understanding.desc1: A GLP-1 weight loss programme is a medically supervised plan that may use GLP-1 based medication to help with appetite control and weight management, plus lifestyle support so results can last.
understanding.desc2: GLP-1 is a natural gut hormone. These medicines work on the same pathway. They help your brain register fullness more strongly, slow stomach emptying, and reduce hunger signals.

whoIsItFor.title: Is a GLP-1 programme right for you?
whoIsItFor.goodFit1: You have tried diet and exercise but your weight keeps returning
whoIsItFor.goodFit2: You feel strong cravings or constant hunger
whoIsItFor.goodFit3: You want a medical plan with monitoring, not guesswork
whoIsItFor.goodFit4: You have weight-related risks (blood sugar, blood pressure, etc.)
whoIsItFor.extraCare1: Pregnant, trying to conceive, or breastfeeding
whoIsItFor.extraCare2: History of pancreatitis or gallbladder disease
whoIsItFor.extraCare4: Taking other medications that affect blood sugar
whoIsItFor.bmiNote: *Pharmacotherapy is generally positioned as an add-on to lifestyle change, not a standalone solution.

programme.title: What's inside a doctor-monitored GLP-1 programme
programme.item1Desc: Review weight history, hunger patterns, health risks, and baseline measurements
programme.item2Desc: Personalised option based on your needs - Semaglutide, Liraglutide, or Tirzepatide
programme.item3Desc: Repeatable eating habits with Malaysian food - protein, fibre, proper portions
programme.item4Desc: Regular tracking of hunger control, side effects, weight, and energy

results.title: What results can you realistically expect?
results.description: Clinical trials show meaningful average weight loss with proper medication and lifestyle support.
results.manage2: Coaching on meal size and food choices
results.safetyDesc: Malaysia's NPRA published safety communication on GLP-1 medicines and aspiration risk during general anaesthesia or deep sedation. Always inform your doctor before any procedure.

faq.q1: How does a GLP-1 weight loss programme work?
faq.a1: A GLP-1 programme uses medication that mimics gut hormones involved in fullness. It can reduce appetite, slow stomach emptying, and help you eat less without constant hunger. It works best when paired with lifestyle support, follow-ups, and medical monitoring.
faq.q2: How long does it take to see results?
faq.a2: Many people notice appetite changes within the first few weeks. Scale changes usually follow after that. It's normal for weight loss to be faster early, then slow down. Consistency over months matters more than quick weekly drops.
faq.q3: Do I need to diet and exercise on a GLP-1 programme?
faq.a3: Yes, but it does not need to be extreme. GLP-1 medicines work best with sustainable nutrition and activity changes. Even a simple plan like higher protein meals, daily steps, and better sleep can improve results. Think 'repeatable', not 'perfect'.
faq.q4: Is GLP-1 the same as fat freezing?
faq.a4: No. GLP-1 supports appetite control and overall weight loss. Fat freezing is a body contouring treatment for local fat pockets. Many people choose GLP-1 first to reduce overall fat, then consider contouring later if needed.

cta.title: Ready to quiet the cravings?
cta.desc1: If you feel like your appetite is running the show, a doctor-monitored GLP-1 weight loss programme in Kuala Lumpur can give you structure and support.
cta.desc2: Start with a proper assessment at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur so your plan fits your body, your risks, and your lifestyle.
